human_verification.notes: Reviewed cloud operations boundaries, evidence traceability, metric logic, escalation behavior, and adjacent-lane routing for analytics, reporting, and disclosure safety.

review_notes: All scenario families include cloud-specific artifact handling and uncertainty controls.
All declared abilities are covered and represented in scenario mapping.
No unresolved blocking evidence requirements remain in declared acceptance expectations.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls isolate cloud operations analytics from incident-command and financial or legal decision authority.
Research and source map includes cloud telemetry, incident, change, monitoring, privacy, and disclosure references.
Scenario coverage includes ambiguity handling, cross-system reconciliation, unsupported claim refusal, and tenant adaptation.
notes: Runtime strategy remains `specification-based` until an explicit retained-implementation package is separately promoted.
Tenant-supplied source precedence, policy context, and privacy matrix remain required for high-confidence publication.
